sections.heading: About this Task
sections.body:
When you delete or add a document, you must manually refresh the
**count results** value on the **Aggregations** tab to reflect
the new document count.

sections.heading: Before You Begin
sections.body:
To count result documents, you must first [Create an Aggregation Pipeline](atlas-ui-create-agg-pipeline) your aggregation pipeline. You can't count result
documents while editing your pipeline.

sections.heading: Step 1: Create and run your aggregation pipeline.
Step 2: Click
sections.body:
After you run your pipeline, click **count results**, which
appears under the **Run** button. The **count results**
button will update with the count of resulting documents.

![Click the count results link](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/compass/agg-builder-click-count-results.png)

sections.heading: Step 3: (Optional) Click the refresh icon
sections.body:
If you edit your pipeline, click refresh refresh to update
your document count.
